problem: PySide6 C++ show() monkeypatching is bypassed by Qt-internals during live integration testing
cause: C++-level virtual calls in PySide6 do not reliably dispatch to Python-overridden base class methods like QMainWindow.show()
rule: Always patch concrete Python event handlers of the subclass, such as PBWindow.showEvent, to hook into widget display events instead of overriding C++ show()
